Can you help me find the train station?.translation: రైల్వే స్టేషన్ కనుగొనడంలో మీరు నాకు సహాయం చేయగలరా?
Can you help me find the train station?.pronunciation: railvē sṭēṣan kanugoṇaḍaṁlō mīru nāku sahāyaṁ cēyagalarā
Can you help me find the train station?.grammar_note: Telugu often packs polite ability and request structure into the verb phrase.
